allow: Bash(python -c "import json,sys; p=json.load\(sys.stdin\); deps={**p.get\('dependencies',{}\), **p.get\('devDependencies',{}\)}; [print\(k,v\) for k,v in sorted\(deps.items\(\)\) if 'three' in k.lower\(\) or 'fiber' in k.lower\(\) or 'drei' in k.lower\(\) or 'framer' in k.lower\(\)]")

Bash(node -e "const fs=require\('fs'\); const path='node_modules/@react-three/fiber/dist/react-three-fiber.cjs.js'; if\(fs.existsSync\(path\)\){const content=fs.readFileSync\(path,'utf8'\); const idx=content.indexOf\('position: \\\\'relative\\\\''\); console.log\(content.slice\(Math.max\(0,idx-200\), idx+500\)\)} else console.log\('file not found'\)")
